citation_and_locator: Wong, Anita Mei-Yin. 2023. Understanding Development and Disorder in Cantonese Using Language Sample Analysis. Routledge; degree-adverb discussion and pp. 46, 57
what_it_supports: Lists `最 zeoi3` “most” as a degree adverb; gives `我最鍾意食花生`; states that pre-adjectival `最` indicates the superlative.
limit: Clinical/developmental coding framework and selected examples do not establish an explicit comparison-set phrase, unrestricted host class, or full adult productivity.

citation_and_locator: Matthews, Stephen, and Virginia Yip. 2011. Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar companion, chapter 9, “Superlatives”
what_it_supports: Gives `最衰係你` (`zeoi3 seoi1 hai6 nei5`) under an explicit superlative heading.
limit: The pragmatic English translation does not establish every compositional reading or comparison-set structure.

citation_and_locator: Lam, Chi Fung. 2013. The Cartography of Spatial Adpositional Phrases in Mandarin and Cantonese. Doctoral thesis, Ca' Foscari University of Venice; section 3.4.3, example 198, pp. 102-103
what_it_supports: States that Cantonese `zeoi` precedes disyllabic localizers and gives `喺禮堂最後面`; analyzes a DegP above the localizer.
limit: Specialized spatial syntax does not establish ordinary NP modification, every localizer, or lexical-compound productivity.
